$comment: Agent Card for the Gatekeeper Agent — aligned with the A2A AgentCard and ERC-8004 agent-card shapes so it can be resolved by A2A clients, ERC-8004 registries, and Web Bot Auth verifiers (all protocols the Terminal 3 ADK targets).
name: Gatekeeper Agent
description: Executes permissioned financial actions on behalf of a user without holding their credentials or data: a BBS+ verifiable-credential eligibility gate plus a hardware-enforced TEE mandate, with per-action audit.

skills.name: Eligibility-gated permissioned action
skills.description: Verify the user is eligible via a BBS+ credential, then enforce a spending mandate (amount, asset, kind, counterparty, time window) inside a Terminal 3 TEE contract before any action is allowed.
examples: Prove I'm an accredited investor without revealing my net worth, then buy up to $5,000 of USDC RWA from an approved counterparty.

skills.name: Hardware-enforced velocity limit
skills.description: Track a cumulative per-window spend total inside the TEE contract's KV store and reject once the running total would exceed the cap — enforced across invocations so the agent cannot reset the counter.
examples: Let the agent spend up to $5,000 per day total, no matter how many transactions it splits that across.

skills.name: A2A capability exchange
skills.description: Prove to a peer agent that this agent holds a required capability via a BBS+ capability credential, disclosing only that capability and hiding the rest of the manifest.
examples: Prove I can execute payments to a counterparty agent without revealing my tier, limit, or region.

skills.name: Web Bot Auth signed requests
skills.description: Sign outbound action requests with RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signatures (Ed25519, web-bot-auth tag) so a destination can cryptographically verify the request came from this agent before acting.
examples: Sign my transfer request so the bank can verify it was issued by this authorized agent.

registrations.note: Trustless Agents identity (ERC-721, agentURI -> this card). Registration script ready: `npm run register:erc8004` calls IdentityRegistry.register(agentURI); needs a gas-funded wallet + registry address.
This document doubles as the A2A AgentCard.
RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signatures for outbound action requests — implemented in agent/src/web-bot-auth.mjs.

execution.attestation: verifyTdxQuote; REPORT_DATA bound to the ML-KEM session key

t3n-session.description: Encrypted, attested TEE session opened via T3nClient.handshake().
